name: Czech Statehood Day
traditions: State awards ceremony at Prague Castle; wreath-laying; Czech flag displays; cultural events; open-door days at monuments.
historicalBackground: Czech Statehood Day honors St. Wenceslas, the patron saint of Bohemia, who was martyred on September 28, 935. It celebrates Czech identity and sovereignty.
description: The Czech Republic's celebration of national identity, honoring the patron saint of Bohemia with ceremonies at Prague Castle.
